summary: A fan’s transformative first "real" Dead experience; recording quality not addressed.
review: The reviewer describes the concert as a life‑changing, sun‑filled night of dancing and community, giving it four stars. No specific comments are made about the audio source or mix, nor about individual songs or performance nuances, so the assessment focuses on overall enthusiasm rather than technical detail.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it is highly enthusiastic (4 stars) and mentions no recording flaws; rating reflects a solid show with unknown audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any technical issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific remarks on set structure or pacing; reviewer focuses on overall vibe and personal impact.
